name: Kettlebell Figure 8 to Reverse Lunge
description: Perform a figure-8 pass between your legs (staying low in a wide stance), then step back into a reverse lunge. Return to standing, do another figure-8 pass, and lunge on the other leg. The figure-8 keeps you in a low squat position working grip and core, then the lunge adds unilateral leg work. More dynamic and cardio-heavy than the halo version.

media.caption: KB halo to reverse lunge + figure 8 to reverse lunge combo
